finding_results.notes: Re-entered Rosie's through throughput-week fallout and the current outing's proximity/convenience, keeping the dead-neon detail while removing repeated table, pool-felt, and jukebox inventory.
Aligned the bartender description to the established Rosie's continuity by restoring the Sharks forearm tattoo and matching the prior no-comment service beat.
Corrected Tommy's self-reported evaluator pay to twenty-one dollars an hour so it matches the continuity sheet and the earlier chapter reference.

summary: Trimmed Rosie's re-entry to stop repeating cross-chapter bar inventory, aligned the bartender to established continuity, and corrected Tommy's pay reference to the canonical amount.
